/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libxiaox_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.so -o rosidl_generator_py/xiaox_interfaces/libxiaox_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/xiaox_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/xiaox_interfaces/srv/_init_device_s.c.o CMakeFiles/xiaox_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/xiaox_interfaces/srv/_read_joints_s.c.o CMakeFiles/xiaox_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/xiaox_interfaces/srv/_write_joints_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/jiehuang/xiaoxbot/ros2/xiaox_ws/build/xiaox_interfaces:/opt/ros/humble/lib: /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so libxiaox_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so libxiaox_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
